items.title: Analyzing Sales Data to Improve Profitability
items.summary: Business intelligence (BI) focuses on collecting and analyzing information about customers, decision-making processes, competition, market conditions and general economic, technological…
items.content_html:
Business intelligence (BI) focuses on collecting and analyzing information about customers, decision-making processes, competition, market conditions and general economic, technological and cultural trends, in order to obtain decision-support information (intelligence).

In this project I have used BI techniques and data analytics to extract useful insights from a real world sales dataset.
